description:
Introductions:

A carburetor/carburettor is a device that mixes air and fuel for internal combustion engines in the proper air–fuel ratio for combustion. A carb consists of an open pipe through which the air passes into the inlet manifold of the engine, it allows air and fuel into the engine through valves, mixing them together in different amounts to suit a wide range of different driving conditions. To carburate or carburet means to mix the air and fuel or to equip an engine with a carby for that purpose.

Features:

- Carters type YFA 1-barrel, automatic choke, auto manual transmissions. Add 5~10% horsepower and maintain near stock fuel mileage, improve throttle response for better engine performance.

- 100% tested For reliability and performance.simple installation and and long life as a guarantee

- Brand New Manufactured with New Premium Quality Components

- 2 years warranty，Fit and Quality Guaranteed，Backed by satisfying after-sales service。

- 5 Common Symptoms of a Bad or Failing Carburetor: （1） Reduced engine performance; （2） Black smoke from exha-ust; （3） Backfiring or overheating; （4） Hard starting; Since it is the component directly responsible for providing the fuel and air needed for the engine to run, the carburetor is one of the most important components on any vehicle equipped with one, and any problems with it can greatly affect the drivability and performance of the vehicle; it is necessary to replace failed Carburetor in time

Specification:

- Placement on Vehicle：Front

- Input Voltage：DC 12V

- Material: Zinc Alloy

- Type : Automatic choke

- Carters Type:YFA 1barrel

- Drive Type: Electric Choke

- Part Type: Fuel System

- Color: Chrome

 

Fitment:

Carburetor Fit for Ford F300 4.9L CA-7051 CA-1270 for 16010-FD300

Suit for Ford Engines:

4.9 L 300 cu

4.1 L 250 cu

3.3 L 200 cu

for Broncos, for Fairmont, for Granada, F100, F150, F250 F350

for Econoline E Series E-100,E-150,E-250, E-350 1965-1985

Note：Replace for Carters type YFA Carb, 1-Barrel, Electric choke

Package Includes:

1x Car Carburetor for Ford

Authority ID：MXR02FXSY

Notice：California Prop 65 Warning
